creator: freeseworld@yopmail.com
text:
FreeBSD 11.2-RELEASE-p9 includes an outdated version of Tor:

$ pkg info tor
tor-0.3.4.9_1

Tor 0.3.4.11 has already been released and Tor nodes running the most recent version available on FreeBSD are not recommended anymore.

Please update to Tor 0.3.4.11. Thanks for helping keeping Tor alive and secure!
